name: OpenAI Compatible
author: DavyWhisper
description: Unified LLM provider supporting OpenAI-compatible APIs. Includes presets for GLM, Kimi, MiniMax, Qwen, and DeepSeek.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 统一的 LLM 提供商，支持所有 OpenAI 兼容 API。预置智谱 GLM、Kimi、MiniMax、通义千问、DeepSeek。
descriptions.en: Unified LLM provider supporting OpenAI-compatible APIs. Includes presets for GLM, Kimi, MiniMax, Qwen, and DeepSeek.
